title: Plum Dumplings
description: A simple dessert made with plums and dumplings, perfect for a sweet treat. The plum filling is wrapped in a dumpling wrapper and steamed to create a delicious and juicy dessert.
instructions: Combine the plums and sugar in a bowl.
Lay a dumpling wrapper on a flat surface.
Place a tablespoon of the plum mixture onto the center of the wrapper.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges to seal.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and plum mixture.
Place the dumplings in a steamer basket.
